title: FileInput
description: File selector with drag & drop support, validation, image previews and two visual variants (inline and prominent area).

multiple.title: Multiple files
multiple.desc: Enable multiple to allow selecting several files at once.

accept.title: Images only
accept.desc: Restrict accepted types with the accept attribute.

dropzone.title: Drag & drop
dropzone.desc: The 'area' variant shows a prominent dropzone with an optional dashed border.

previews.title: With previews
previews.desc: Selected images automatically show a thumbnail.

props.accept: Accepted file type filter (MIME types or extensions).
props.maxSize: Maximum file size per file in bytes.
props.maxFiles: Maximum number of files in multiple mode.
props.dropzone: Enables drag & drop on the area.
props.dropzoneVariant: Presentation style: compact row or prominent dropzone area.
props.dropzoneHeight: Minimum height of the area when dropzoneVariant="area".
props.dashed: Applies a dashed border to the wrapper.
props.dropzoneLabel: Main text of the dropzone area (dropzoneVariant="area" only).
props.dropzoneHint: Secondary text of the dropzone area (dropzoneVariant="area" only).
props.clickToSelect: Clicking anywhere on the area opens the native file picker.
props.label: Visible label above the control.
props.placeholder: Text shown when no files are selected.
props.errorText: Error message that replaces the helperText.
props.color: Semantic color for focus and accent.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the file list changes (syncs v-model).
emits.reject: Emitted when a file is rejected due to type, size or count constraints.

types.title: FileInputFile
types.desc: Shape of each file managed by the component. Useful when providing external progress or error maps.
types.name: File name (human-readable).
types.previewUrl: Local object URL for image previews (created via URL.createObjectURL).

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbSpace: Open the native file picker (when clickToSelect is true)
a11y.ariaInvalid: Set to true when errorText is present
a11y.ariaDescribedBy: Links helper or error text to the control for screen reader context
a11y.ariaRequired: Set to true when the required prop is active
a11y.ariaDisabled: Communicates disabled state to assistive technologies
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name when no visible label is present
a11y.focusNative: The file input is a native element — participates in the tab order by default
a11y.focusDropzone: The dropzone area is focusable when clickToSelect is enabled
